Sound familiar?

The moment that holds you back

I hear these same words from almost every new client I meet.

"

"I've been here two years. I still can't get through a full conversation without switching to English."

"

"The Algarvian accent is nothing like what I learned. When locals speak fast I don't understand a word."

"

"I know I should practise more, but the fear of making mistakes in front of people stops me every time."

Who I am

A coach who truly understands

FR · PT · ES · EN
4 languages, 1 coach

Certified Language & Anxiety Coach

Cédric Martin

I grew up with French, moved to Portugal where Portuguese became my second native language, picked up Spanish living near the border, and eventually embraced English. Language has always been a natural part of my life — but I know that's not the case for everyone.

Anxiety is something I've known well in other areas of life. While language anxiety specifically hasn't been my personal challenge, I deeply understand how fear holds us back. That's exactly why I trained as a certified Anxiety & Stress Management Coach — to give my clients more than just language teaching.

My method, CmartWise, is structured, personalised, and anxiety-free. Built from real experience with expats, professionals, and families across Portugal, Spain and France.

🎓 CPD Certified · Anxiety & Stress Coach
📋 TEFL Certified
🌍 4 Native Languages

Online · Flexible sessions

"Overcoming language anxiety is a journey, just like any other path to personal growth. Each step forward, no matter how small, is a victory. I'm here to walk this path with you — not as someone who's never struggled, but as someone who truly understands how anxiety can hold us back."

— Cédric Martin, CmartWise

My method

How I get you there in 3 months

A structured, anxiety-free journey I've refined with every client I work with across the Algarve.

1

Month one

I train your ear first

We start by tuning your ear to how Portuguese is really spoken in the Algarve — not the textbook version. Understanding unlocks everything else.

2

Month two

I dissolve the speaking fear

Together we work through the anxiety using certified techniques. You practise real-life situations — café, market, neighbours — in a safe, non-judgmental space.

3

Month three

I guide you into the culture

True fluency is cultural. I help you understand the humour, the unspoken rules, and the social rhythms that make you feel you truly belong here.

My toolkit

How I help you beat speaking anxiety

Techniques I've developed, certified, and refined across hundreds of coaching sessions.

🏆

Celebrate every small win

I build your confidence brick by brick. Every new word, every short exchange — we mark it. Momentum is what drives real progress.

🎵

Rhythm & music

I use rhythm and music to make speaking feel natural and enjoyable — never like a test you can fail.

🔄

Reframe every mistake

In my sessions, mistakes are progress. I help you see each error as a step forward, not a reason to stop.

🎯

Goals tailored to your life

Your neighbourhood, your workplace, your family — I tailor every goal to your real life. Nothing generic, ever.

🧠

Visualisation

I guide you through mental rehearsal techniques — drawn from my anxiety coaching certification — that genuinely reduce speaking anxiety.

🛡️

A truly safe space

My sessions are non-judgmental by design. You take risks, make mistakes, and grow. That's where real confidence is born.

Real results, real people

You can’t help but like him a lot!"
